title: Prominent candidates in Chennai file nomination papers, set out to canvass votes
content: While AIADMK’s Valarmathi filed nomination papers for Thousand Lights, DMK’s Ma. Subramanian held campaign in Saidapet

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: O. Panneerselvam files nomination in Bodi; lashes out at Edappadi Palaniswam
content: AIADMK has already been facing defeat after defeat and will continue to decline; under the leadership of Chief Minister M. K. Stalin, the DMK will form the government again and implement more beneficial programmes for the people of Tamil Nadu, says OPS

title: 13 killed, 30 injured in multi-vehicle collision in Bihar’s Katihar
content: The collision involved a bus, a truck, and a pickup van; the bus driver may have lost control of the vehicle, leading to the accident, the police say

title: Bengal polls 2026: Modi, Mamata spar over UCC implementation
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi, Union Home Minister Amit Shah, Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee and Trinamool general secretary Abhishek Banerjee addressed multiple rallies across the State during the day.

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: Thirumayam constituency battles a slew of problems
content: Encompassing Thirumayam, Arimalam, and Ponnamaravathy unions, the constituency continues to remain industrially backward necessitating many educated youth to move out in search of employment; farmers complain that sufficient attention has not been paid to water management in this rain-fed region

title: Watch: Many killed in multi-vehicle collision in Bihar’s Katihar
content: Ten people were killed and 25 others injured following a collision involving a bus, a truck, and a pickup van in Bihar’s Katihar district on Saturday (April 11, 2026) evening, a police officer said. The accident took place at 6.30 p.m. on NH 31 in Kodha block of Katihar.

title: 35-year-old man arrested after sexually assaulting five-year-old girl in Chhattisgarh’s Durg
content: According to the police, the accused lured the girl into his house on the pretext of giving her chocolates; girl, who was  found gagged and abandoned in a sack, hospitalised and her condition is stable, say police

title: Candidature of R.G. Kar victim’s mother gets mixed response from public, civil society members
content: Ratna Debnath is the BJP candidate from Panihati; she has drawn empathy but her candidature raises concerns over the politicisation of a non-partisan justice movement for the R.G. Kar victim

title: Congress veteran Dhanushkodi Athithan calls for making the party a people’s movement
content: Dhanuskodi Athithan, a long-standing Congress leader and former Union Minister of State for Youth Affairs and Sport, wants the party to do field work and take up people’s issues. “Look at Tirunelveli and Kanniyakumari districts where the party is still strong. This is because of this approach,” he points out

title: A debate on the tenure of Election Commission-appointed police chief in Tamil Nadu
content: However, the EC order did not specify a tenure for him. The question is whether Mr. Rathore would be entitled to a minimum two-year tenure, as mandated by the Supreme Court in the  landmark Prakash Singh case. However, this ruling applies only to appointments made through the UPSC-led process

title: Phule left a lasting legacy of social reform and inclusion, says President Murmu
content: President Droupadi Murmu leads celebration to mark Jyotirao Phule’s 199th birth anniversary as Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Leader of Opposition in Lok Sabha Rahul Gandhi join in

title: ED raids former Trinamool Minister Partha Chatterjee’s residence
content: Five months after securing bail, the former senior TMC leader has again come under the ED’s scanner with the fresh raids at his residence in south Kolkata’s Naktala area

title: Torpedoing of Iranian ship a first for Indian Ocean Region, must not be repeated: Mauritius Foreign Minister
content: Mauritius Foreign Minister Dhananjay Ramful praises India for being a ‘first responder’, hopes U.S.-Iran peace talks in Pakistan end in long-term agreement

title: Youth Congress leader stabbed to death, six questioned so far
content: In ghastly incident, a Youth Congress leader was stabbed to death by miscreants in his home in Dharwad on Friday night and the Hubballi Dharwad Police have questioned six suspects so far in connection with the murder.

title: Trinamool’s ‘nepo babies’ face tough contest in 2026 Assembly election
content: Trio includes Shrreya Pande, daughter of late Minister Sadhan Pande from Maniktala; Sirsanya Banerjee, son of MP Kalyan Banerjee from Uttarpara; and Tirthankar Ghosh, son of chief whip Nirmal Ghosh from Panihati

title: Farmers across Haryana protest against new rules for crop procurement
content: Farmer leaders accuse the State government of denying Minimum Support Price for various crops by making the procurement process more difficult, and imposing extraneous and stringent conditions

title: Assembly Elections 2026 highlights: BJP tried to invalidate my candidature in Bhabanipur, says Mamata
content: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee accused the BJP of "plotting to forcefully capture votes through fraudulent means as they don't have the guts to fight and win the elections democratically".

title: Teams led by CSIR women scientists report advances in research on depression mechanisms in females
content: A group of scientists at Hyderabad’s CSIR-IICT are leading transformative research in decoding female-specific depression mechanisms. Their work not only addresses critical scientific gaps but also advances inclusive healthcare solutions, highlighting the growing impact of women in India’s research ecosystem

title: ‘PM RAHAT’: free medical services for road accident victims in A.P. soon
content: Free medical services costing ₹1.5 lakh will be provided to the victims during the ‘golden hour’ at 687 private and 17 government network hospitals

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: Pollution by closed chromium factory, untreated effluents remain unsolved in Ranipet constituency
content: Another issue that plagues voters in the constituency is the lack of proper connectivity by buses and trains

title: Karnataka police to bring back over 3,000 orderlies to active duty
content: Orderlies for officers will be reduced by 50%, and in Bengaluru alone, around 1,239 personnel working as orderlies will return to field duties

title: Hot and humid conditions likely in Andhra Pradesh till April 18
content: Pottipadu in Kadapa registers the day’s highest temperature of 44.7°C; Gudur in Nellore district, and Satyavedu and Varadaiahpalem in Tirupati district record severe heatwave conditions

title: NIRM to suggest measures to check landslides at Indrakeeladri in Vijayawada
content: NIRM experts have launched a survey and they will identify vulnerable points where the rocks or the soil are weak

title: Tornado in Jammu triggers panic among locals; no damage reported
content: Director of J&K Meteorological Dept. said the tornado was an extremely rare event for the region, though similar phenomena were observed in several parts of Punjab last year

title: Students explore Zero Shadow Day at Summer Science Camp
content: The event held at the Government College, Attingal explained the scientific principles behind the event

title: YSRCP bent on creating uncertainty on Amaravati, says Municipal Administration Minister Narayana
content: The intention behind YSRCP president Jagan Mohan Reddy’s strange ‘MAVIGUN’ plan is to keep the people, especially farmers in the capital region, nervous, he says, while asserting that the capital works are progressing at a fast pace and 98.60% of the allocation of returnable plots has been completed

title: India, U.S. to deepen nuclear ties, explore LPG exports
content: Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri meets U.S. Energy Secretary Chris Wright; talks focus on advancing energy security, deepening energy trade, says Indian Embassy

title: McIlroy is all alone through 36 holes; can anyone catch him?
content: One year after winning his first Masters, McIlroy has a record 6-shot lead and has 36 more holes to add.

title: Panel rules NFL teams didn't collude on QB deals
content: An appeals panel upheld a decision that there wasn't sufficient evidence of collusion by teams when negotiating the contracts of Kyler Murray, Lamar Jackson and Russell Wilson in 2022, according to a copy of the ruling obtained by multiple outlets.

title: Sources: Hamby finalizing deal to remain in L.A.
content: Dearica Hamby, a three-time WNBA All-Star, is finalizing a multiyear deal to return to the Sparks, sources told ESPN.

title: Sabally agrees to multiyear deal with Liberty
content: Satou Sabally has agreed to sign a multiyear deal with the New York Liberty, her agent Zack Miller of WME Basketball told ESPN's Shams Charania, Alexa Philippou and Kendra Andrews.

title: Alcaraz, Sinner to vie for Monte Carlo title, No. 1
content: Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner will meet for the eighth time in a tournament final when the pair squares off in Sunday's Monte-Carlo Masters final with the No. 1 ranking also at stake.

title: Cowboys S Bell arrested, facing drug charges
content: Cowboys safety Markquese Bell has been arrested and charged with possession of a controlled substance and marijuana, according to Collin County jail records.

title: SGA, Jokic among at least 168 out NBA-wide Fri.
content: Around the NBA, no fewer than 168 players were held out of Friday's games, including reigning MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, three-time MVP Nikola Jokic and 14 members of the Grizzlies.

title: Arteta: Arsenal defeat a 'big punch in the face'
content: Mikel Arteta lamented his Arsenal side's "strange" performance in their 2-1 defeat to Bournemouth on Saturday, saying the result was a "big punch in the face."

title: 🏈 NFL draft rankings: Miller's top 482 players
content: Matt Miller has finalized his rankings for the 2026 draft, listing top players and providing grades for each one.

title: Which of the NFL draft's QBs will be elite? We projected the top five prospects
content: Aaron Schatz uses his QBASE 2.0 model to project NFL career ceilings and floors for the 2026 draft class' QBs.

content: When a prospect skips combine workouts, teams can use artificial intelligence to project his measurables.

content: NBA players are spending more time than ever working on the boards -- but we're not talking rebounds.

content: Teams with championship hopes fall down our list while unexpected contenders have made surprise starts.

content: WNBA free agency is here. Satou Sabally is going to New York while Skylar Diggins is going to Chicago.

content: Will Lauren Betts, Awa Fam, Azzi Fudd or Olivia Miles go No. 1, and which transfers boosted their draft stock?

content: We're handing out report cards on big moves, including the Raiders' Kirk Cousins deal and the Eagles' Dontayvion Wicks trade.

content: Summer is here for 10 franchises that missed the postseason. What lies ahead for Milwaukee, Dallas and each eliminated team?

title: Free agency turns 50: Ranking the best -- and worst -- signings in MLB history
content: The first free agent contract ever was signed 50 years ago today. We rate the 8,340 deals of the past half-century.

title: Rankings: Top 100 players for 2026
content: Plan for the 2026 Fantasy Women's Basketball season with the top 100 rankings, including player position ranks.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal eye summer move for Newcastle's Gordon
content: Arsenal are considering a summer move for Newcastle United's Anthony Gordon. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: US-Iran direct talks in Pakistan mark first since 1979: What’s at stake
content: High-level talks are underway in Pakistan between US and Iranian delegations. The discussions aim to secure a ceasefire and find a path to lasting peace. Key points on the agenda include the situation in Lebanon, control of the Strait of Hormuz, Iran's nuclear program, and sanctions relief. Troop withdrawal from the region is also a significant demand.

title: France to drop Windows: Government to shift to Linux; EU pushes digital sovereignty
content: France is ditching Microsoft Windows for Linux, a significant step in Europe's push for digital sovereignty and reduced reliance on American tech giants. This move, aimed at regaining control over data and digital infrastructure, aligns with broader EU efforts to lessen dependence on foreign technology. The initiative begins with government digital agencies, signaling a strategic shift in national digital policy.

title: Legendary singer Asha Bhosle suffers chest infection; admitted to Mumbai hospital
content: Legendary singer Asha Bhosle was rushed to the hospital on Saturday night. Reports confirm she suffered a heart attack. She is currently admitted to Breach Candy Hospital in Mumbai. Bhosle, a celebrated voice in Indian music, has had a career spanning over seven decades. Her vast filmography includes thousands of songs across various languages.

title: Two years after Google CEO Sundar Pichai’s ‘Code Red’, Satya Nadella orders AI overhaul
content: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella has initiated a 'Copilot code red' to enhance AI performance and user experience, aiming to boost investor confidence amidst intense competition.  The company is allocating significant cloud capacity to Copilot development, with analysts suggesting Azure can still exceed expectations due to growing demand and pricing.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office collection: Ranveer Singh starrer inches towards Rs 1100cr
content: The buzz around Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' shows no signs of waning, as it approaches the astounding mark of Rs 1100 crore within just 24 days. This espionage thriller has set a new benchmark in the industry, being the first Bollywood film to achieve the Rs 1000 crore milestone in India. Read the full article to know more in detail.

title: 'Will be attacked in 30 mins': US vessel returns after Iran's Hormuz warning as truce talks under way
content: A US military vessel reportedly retreated after Iran issued a 30-minute attack warning near the Strait of Hormuz. Despite ongoing peace talks, tanker traffic surged, with Greek and Chinese vessels transiting, though overall oil flows remain significantly reduced. An Indian LPG tanker also crossed, marking a post-ceasefire milestone amidst hundreds of stranded ships.

title: Google AI CEO Demis Hassabis says ChatGPT did something in 2022 that can't be undone
content: Demis Hassabis, CEO of Google DeepMind, says ChatGPT's viral 2022 launch triggered a "ferocious commercial pressure race" that nobody—including OpenAI—was prepared for. Speaking to Cleo Abram, he said every major lab had equivalent systems at the time; OpenAI just shipped first. Hassabis had wanted AI kept in the lab longer, focused on scientific breakthroughs. Now he's racing alongside everyone else—and watching the guardrails get harder to build.

title: 'Very odd': CSK criticised for retiring out Ayush Mhatre on 59 off 36
content: Chennai Super Kings sparked controversy by retiring out Ayush Mhatre on 59 during their IPL 2026 clash against Delhi Capitals. Despite his strong knock and partnership with Sanju Samson (115*), CSK opted for Shivam Dube to accelerate late scoring. While the move worked, fans called it “very odd,” questioning the rare tactical decision to remove a well-set batter.

title: ‘Praise be to Allah’: Trump goes on social media spree as peace talks with Iran begin in Pakistan
content: Amidst US-Iran peace talks in Pakistan following a ceasefire, President Trump claimed the US is clearing the Strait of Hormuz and asserted Iran is losing its war. He also boasted about US oil reserves and vowed to prevent fertilizer price gouging, stating American farmers have his support.

title: This man has built a vegetable cooling crate that works without electricity
content: Indian fruit and vegetable sellers face significant losses due to spoilage in summer heat. Vishal Sighal has developed the 'Cold Easy Box,' an affordable, electricity-free cooling crate using water evaporation. This innovation, priced at Rs 3,500, helps vendors preserve produce, reduce waste, and protect their earnings, offering a sustainable solution to a widespread problem.

title: Bihar: At least 10 killed after bus collides with pickup van in Katihar
content: A devastating road accident in Bihar's Katihar district claimed the lives of at least 10 people and left 25 injured. The collision, involving a bus and a pickup van on NH-31 near Gerabari, prompted immediate medical attention for the wounded. Authorities are working to provide care and investigate the tragic incident.

title: Samson roars back with IPL hundred, joins Rohit and Kohli in elite club
content: Sanju Samson silenced critics with a magnificent century for Chennai Super Kings against Delhi Capitals in IPL 2026. After a shaky start to his CSK career, Samson anchored the innings with a brilliant 102*, including a vital partnership with Ayush Mhatre. This commanding knock, his fourth IPL ton, also saw him cross 400 T20 sixes, cementing his return to form.

title: IPL: Iyer-led PBKS script history, become first-ever in T20 cricket to..
content: Punjab Kings made T20 history by becoming the first team to chase 200-plus totals 10 times, defeating Sunrisers Hyderabad by six wickets. Priyansh Arya and Prabhsimran Singh gave a strong start, while Shreyas Iyer’s unbeaten 69 guided the chase. Despite SRH’s 219, powered by Abhishek Sharma’s 74, Punjab stayed unbeaten this season.

title: Shocking! Man casually walks into JLN track during final race - Watch
content: The Athletics Federation of India faces backlash after a man walked onto the track during a junior 200m race in New Delhi, forcing a runner to avoid collision. The viral incident raised safety concerns and drew criticism online, with fans calling it a “shocking” lapse. The episode has sparked wider doubts about event management as India eyes hosting global sporting events.

title: Centre hikes export duty on diesel, jet fuel amid Gulf crisis: Key changes
content: India has significantly hiked export duties on diesel and Aviation Turbine Fuel (ATF) to Rs 55.5 and Rs 42 per litre respectively, effective immediately. This move aims to curb rising fuel costs impacting airfares and protect airlines and passengers amidst volatile global oil prices. Petrol exports remain duty-free.

title: From sceptic to negotiator: JD Vance leads US-Iran talks- why Trump chose him
content: US Vice President JD Vance is now leading critical talks with Iran. This assignment comes with significant political and diplomatic risks. Vance himself stated he pushed for involvement, believing he could make a difference. Despite differing views on nuclear enrichment, the US and Iran are engaged in these crucial discussions.

title: When will Dhoni return? Gaikwad provides big update
content: MS Dhoni's return to the Chennai Super Kings jersey remains uncertain due to a calf strain, with fans eagerly awaiting updates. Captain Ruturaj Gaikwad confirmed Dhoni is supporting the team from the hotel and will be back on the field soon. The team aims for their first win of the season.

title: Why mild annoyance at Trump won't help Keir Starmer
content: Trump has treated the UK the way he has treated Europe, NATO and anyone else he thinks is not carrying its water. Starmer, in contrast, has tried to draw a line. He has said Britain will not repeat the “mistakes of Iraq” and will act only on a “lawful basis”. Even that, however, pales in comparison to the bluntness coming out of Europe. France’s Emmanuel Macron has openly mocked Trump’s inconsistency, saying “you have to be serious” and warning that a leader “can’t contradict himself every day.” Against that, Starmer’s irritation feels less like defiance and more like discomfort.

title: IPL: PBKS unbeaten streak continues as Iyer outclasses SRH in run-fest
content: Punjab Kings secured a six-wicket victory against Sunrisers Hyderabad in an IPL match. Shreyas Iyer led the chase with an unbeaten 69. Earlier, Priyansh Arya and Prabhsimran Singh provided a strong opening stand. Sunrisers Hyderabad posted 219 for six, with Abhishek Sharma scoring 74. Punjab Kings successfully chased the target with seven deliveries remaining.

title: Kissa cough syrup ka: When medicine is cast as contraband
content: India's push for 'Jan Vishwas' faces a stark contradiction as authorities increasingly use stringent NDPS and BNS laws against licensed pharmaceutical stockists. Despite clear regulations under the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, businesses dealing in common cough syrups are being prosecuted, blurring lines between regulation and criminality. This trend risks eroding trust and undermining the rule of law.

title: Ranveer Singh praised for kind gesture towards wheelchair cricketer Bhima Khunti
content: Bollywood's dynamic star Ranveer Singh is making headlines not just for his acting chops but also for his heartwarming interaction with Bhima Khunti, an inspiring wheelchair cricketer.

title: Sunrisers Hyderabad create IPL history, become first team to ...
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad's opening pair, Abhishek Sharma and Travis Head, unleashed an unprecedented Powerplay assault against Punjab Kings, smashing 105 runs without loss. Abhishek recorded a blistering half-century in 18 balls and equaled the record for most sixes in a Powerplay with seven, highlighting SRH's dominance.

title: ‘This isn’t education’: Student made to fan headmistress; video goes viral
content: A viral video from Rewa district shows a government middle school headmistress, Varsha Manjhi, being fanned by a student during class. The incident has sparked outrage, with locals condemning it as exploitation. Authorities are investigating and promise strict action.

title: 'Phasa diya ... but Dhoni': Mukul Choudhary passes big test
content: Mukul Choudhary, a 21-year-old, became an overnight sensation after a stunning last-ball victory for Lucknow Super Giants against Kolkata Knight Riders. He smashed seven sixes in a fearless display, scoring an unbeaten 54 off 27 balls to chase down 182. Choudhary credited captain Rishabh Pant for his composure under pressure.

title: 'Waiting for you': Trump flexes US oil, gas reserves amid Iran talks
content: President Donald Trump highlighted America's vast oil and gas reserves, asserting they surpass the combined output of the next two leading nations, boasting superior quality.  Meanwhile, delegations from the US and Iran, including key diplomats and envoys, arrived in Islamabad for crucial peace talks concerning the Middle East conflict.

title: US denies Iranian claim of agreeing to unfreeze assets amid talks
content: The White House has denied reports of an agreement to release Iran's frozen $6 billion in foreign banks, a claim made by a senior Iranian source amid ongoing ceasefire negotiations.

title: Close shave: Chhagan Bhujbal’s helicopter lands in parking area in Pune- watch
content: Maharashtra minister Chhagan Bhujbal's helicopter mistakenly landed in a Pune parking lot instead of the designated helipad. The pilot reportedly confused an open parking space for the landing site. While no accident occurred and all were safe, an inquiry is underway to determine if it was a technical or human error.

title: 'No deal’ if ‘Israel first’: Iran draws red line amid US talks
content: High-level Iranian and US delegations are in Islamabad for critical talks aimed at stabilizing a fragile ceasefire. Iran's Vice President stated a deal hinges on meeting 'America First' representatives, warning against 'Israel First' engagement. Prime Minister Sharif called the negotiations 'make or break,' with a 15-day window for a diplomatic resolution or renewed conflict.

title: Virat Kohli's 'naagin dance' thrills crowd; fans respond in style - WATCH
content: Rajasthan Royals secured a six-wicket victory over Royal Challengers Bengaluru in Guwahati. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's explosive 78 off 26 balls and Dhruv Jurel's unbeaten 81 off 43 deliveries were instrumental. Earlier, Rajat Patidar's 63 had guided RCB to 201. Virat Kohli's pre-match dance entertained the crowd. Rajasthan remains unbeaten.

title: US-Iran war: At nearly $700bn, how India’s forex are strong armour against global crises
content: Fundamentally, foreign exchange reserves tell us about a country’s ability to service its external debt. The more robust the cover, the better a country’s position of economic strength. So how strong is India placed in terms of foreign exchange reserves?

title: Who is Sykkuno? Streamer faces allegations shaking wholesome image
content: Sykkuno faces serious allegations after HemomalVT accused him of manipulation, cheating, and exploiting smaller creators through a detailed exposé with screenshots and audio clips. Claims suggest he maintained multiple relationships while hiding a long-term girlfriend. Another creator, Elfilea, was also mentioned. With no response from Sykkuno yet, the controversy has divided fans and shaken his long-standing wholesome image.

title: ‘Gandhi mein aag lag rahi hai bhai’: Firefighters recall cash discovery at Justice Verma's house
content: A fire at Justice Yashwant Varma's Delhi residence revealed partially burnt high-denomination currency notes, sparking a high-level judicial and governmental probe. A fireman's remark about Gandhi on the notes, captured on video, highlighted the incident's gravity. The discovery led to swift action, with the Delhi Police Commissioner briefing the Chief Justice and a report sent to the Union Home Ministry.

title: 13 Killed, 30 Injured In Massive Highway Pile-Up In Bihar
content: Those travelling in the pickup van were coming from the neighbouring Purnea district, said a local police official adding that the bus driver also suffered severe injuries.

title: Bhopal's Infamous 90-Degree Bridge To Be Redesigned After Months of Outrage
content: The controversial 90-degree Railway Overbridge in Bhopal's Aishbagh, which has been mocked across the country for its 'faulty design', will now be redesigned and opened to the public.

title: Wedding A Day Ago, Family Now Preps For 4 Funerals After Highway Accident
content: Eyewitnesses described scenes of chaos and horror, as the mangled auto lay buried beneath the overturned truck

title: Peace Talks Begin In Pakistan, Donald Trump Calls Iran "Failing Nation"
content: Trilateral ceasefire talks between the United States, Iran and Pakistan have started in Islamabad. The two countries still appeared to be far apart on key issues such as sanctions, Lebanon, and the opening of the strategic Strait of Hormuz.

title: US Retail Inflation Jumps To 2-Year High Over Iran War's Economic Shock
content: The US has spent millions of dollars on military operations, and the economy has begun to show warning signs in retail inflation, particularly in energy.

title: Pakistani 5-Star Hotel Becomes Unlikely Site For US-Iran Talks
content: The luxury five-star Serena Hotel in Pakistan's capital has become the unlikely venue for peace talks aimed at ending the Iran war, cementing its status as one of Islamabad's most heavily fortified buildings.

title: 1st Indian Vessel Crosses Strait Of Hormuz After US-Iran Ceasefire
content: Ship tracking data showed the tanker moved through the strategic waterway between Friday night and Saturday morning and was located in the Gulf of Oman, east of the Strait on Saturday afternoon, proceeding eastwards.

title: Israel Strikes South Lebanon As Iran Pushes For Ceasefire In Pakistan
content: Israel is carrying out large-scale air attacks in southern Lebanon amid peace talks in Islamabad, as Iran insists on including Lebanon in any ceasefire deal.

title: BMW Flattened After Truck Falls On It In Andhra, High Court Lawyer Killed
content: According to preliminaryreports, the tanker, which was carrying ready-mix concrete, lost control while turning because of brake failure.

title: US-Israel-Iran War LIVE Updates: 'Starting Process Of Clearing It Out': Trump's Big Claim On Strait Of Hormuz
content: Iran's Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf has arrived in Islamabad for peace talks with US, JD Vance is said to be en route.

title: Poll Body Withdraws Key Appointment In Tamil Nadu After DMK's 'Biased' Barb
content: The Election Commission said in its new order that Sandeep Mittal will continue as the Director General of Police (Armed Police).

title: Odisha IAS Officer Cheats Man Of Rs 95 Lakh, Then Gives Death Threats
content: Aradhana Das is accused of cheating a complainant named Kamal Kumar Bhawsinka, a differently-abled person, by taking Rs 95 lakh on the promise of providing land.

content: "There have been allegations that Washington wrote that tweet for the Pakistani prime minister," Shashi Tharoor said

title: After 28 Years As BJP Peon, Ramesh Bhil Gets Ticket For Civic Election
content: In a move that has become a major talking point in the Mehsana Municipal Corporation elections, BJP has granted a ticket to Ramesh Bhil, a dedicated staff member who has served as a peon at the Mehsana District BJP office.

title: Amid Bombing In Lebanon, Sanitation Workers Keep Streets Alive
content: At first light, with the sounds and smoke of overnight explosions still in the air, a small municipal truck drives into a deserted street in Tyre, a coastal town in south Lebanon. Men in fluorescent vests climb down, moving quickly past buildings red

title: Watch: PM Modi, Rahul Gandhi's Rare Candid Chat In Parliament Complex
content: The PM and the Congress MP were among leaders who had gathered at the Parliament complex to pay tribute to social reformer Mahatma Jyotirao Phule.

title: Decoding Trinamool's Poll Campaign: Strategy, Messaging And Narrative
content: A key pillar of the campaign has been the "Banglar Vote Raksha" initiative, launched as a proactive response to concerns around the Special Intensive Revision (SIR).

title: 'Will End Appeasement Politics; Not Allow Bengalis Become Minority': PM Modi
content: Addressing a rally at Jangipur in Muslim-majority Murshidabad district, PM Modi said the BJP's election manifesto, released by Union Home Minister Amit Shah on Friday, is a roadmap to end TMC's 'Mahajungleraj' in West Bengal.

title: How An Israeli Spy Firm Unleashed Sting Ops On Elites Of A European Country
content: A private spy firm founded by former members of Israeli intelligence has confirmed its involvement in a sting operation nL6N3YD0Q8 targeting state officials and private interests in Cyprus, saying it wanted to expose corruption.

title: Roman Reigns' Top 10 WrestleMania main events: Which match finished No. 1?
content: Roman Reigns will challenge CM Punk at WrestleMania 42 Night 2 on April 18 at Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas for the world heavyweight championship in his 11th main event . he defeated Brock Lesnar at the "Winner Take All" main event between lesnar and thera .

title: Senator contacts leagues over 'gambling's ugly takeover'
content: senator sends letters to six league commissioners raising concerns about "gambling's ugly takeover of sports" he asks the leagues to provide information by may 1 about their partnerships with both sportsbooks and prediction markets . he says the growing prediction market space has "only made the problem wow"

title: Men's transfer rankings: The top 60 players in the portal right now
content: more than 1,000 men's basketball players added their names to the transfer portal . the portal drew around 2,100 players in 2024 and nearly 2,700 players last year . most coaches expect this season's portal entrants to surpass the 3,000 mark .

title: Options for Rangers if Wyatt Langford misses time

title: 'I bleed orange and black': How Rick Tocchet steered the Flyers back into the playoff race
content: tocchet was hired as flyers coach last summer after playing 621 games with Philly . fans were critical of how he chose to deploy young star Matvei Michkov . he shook off digs that his rigid system wasn't aesthetically pleasing . there's an online petition calling for him to develop young talent .

title: Spring game previews: Alabama, Florida among ones to note Saturday
content: nine power 4 schools hold an event on saturday, April 11 . it's spring game season in the world of college football with four games . a quarterback battle at Alabama between Austin Mack and Keelon Russell .

title: What the DOJ's NFL investigation could mean for networks, fans
content: the federal government has opened a probe into whether the NFL is harming consumers in the way it sells its broadcast rights . a growing chorus of lawmakers and fans have expressed concern over the NFL and other leagues putting more games on subscription streaming services, leading to potentially increased costs for viewers . the probe is unclear, but the NFL has a limited antitrust exemption as part of the Sports Broadcasting Act of 1961 .

title: 2026 rankings: Profiles for more than 30 tight ends
